description_long: This apartment building features a modern, rectangular design with four stories and a flat roof. The facade is dominated by a central vertical strip of blue-tinted windows, flanked by symmetrical balconies with white railings on each side. The exterior walls are a deep green, contrasted by blue window frames and white balcony railings, giving the building a contemporary appearance. The ground level includes a fenced perimeter with a paved area and landscaped greenery, including small trees and shrubs. The rear of the building has a simpler window arrangement without balconies, while the sides feature additional windows and balconies. The main entrance is located at the front, accessible via a short set of steps leading to double doors.
description: A modern four-story apartment building with a flat roof, blue-tinted windows, and symmetrical balconies, surrounded by a fenced paved area and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central blue window strip, and symmetrical balconies with white railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the balconies, flat roof overhang, and a row of windows without balconies.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with evenly spaced windows and no balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing balconies and a side entrance area with landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, with larger blue-tinted windows at the front and smaller, evenly spaced windows on the sides and rear. Balconies are paired with windows on the front and sides, while the rear has only windows.
